title: Roll the Dice
description: Every Saturday morning your order comes with a roll of the dice — ρίξε το ζάρι and win something good. Land a 6 for a cookie on us, a 5 to size up to a large, a 4 or 2 for 20% off your next drink, and double sixes for a coffee on the house.

title: Bazaar × anotherantz
description: A summer bazaar with anotherantz (@_.anotherantz._) — handmade pieces spread across the shop, a freddo in hand, and a slow afternoon of browsing with friends.

title: Bazaar × Label Done
description: We handed the racks over to Label Done (@mylabeldone) for the day — prints, pieces and finds all around the shop. We also ran a giveaway: a Label Done tee and a big bag of Cafeistas coffee went home with two lucky regulars.

title: Masquerade Party
description: Carnival season, τσέρι-style. Masks on, music up — we turned the shop into a masquerade for one night of costumes, coffee and good company.

title: A Heart with Every Cup
description: This Valentine's, every coffee came with a little something extra — a heart-shaped treat on the house, handed over with your cup. Our sweet way of saying we love having you here.
